title: DisplayTime
description: A datapack that allows you to display in-game time and day count in Minecraft.
body:
# Display Time
This datapack allows you to display in-game time and current day count.

## ⚙️ Options
You can use the **/trigger displayTime** command to access the user options menu.
In this menu you can choose which information you want to display (Time, Day Count), you can also choose where you want to display them (Hotbar or Bossbar) and in which format (12H or 24H)

⚠️ The 12H format only works with the hotbar display.

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a2c0e5918856339f6b589fc2da80eaa10153039.png)

## 📦 Installation and Uninstallation
Use **/function displaytime:init** command to initialize the datapack.
To properly uninstall the datapack, use the **/function displaytime:uninstall** command.

## 🧰 Report an Issue
💬 If you encounter any issues with the datapack or have any suggestions, you can contact me through my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/cUBu52uYFb).
